surface_verification.justification: BP-1 producer change to compliance scoring + the iterate FR-gate + the detective audit + a new shared classification SSOT. No product web/api/cli/UI/store surface is introduced or changed; the compliance dashboard/RTM are static tracked .md, and the event wire-format already carried change_type/none_reason/spec_impact (only the compliance reader gained them) so the WebUI is unaffected. Empirically verified by live real-data runs: grade B 87.2 -> A 100.0, D1 fail -> pass, full detective audit any_fail=False, 211/211 events traced + gate-valid, dashboard freeze row WARN; plus the full suites (compliance 736, shared 3580+61+196, integration 169) and pinned-ruff clean.

degraded: External LLM review unavailable (no OPENROUTER/GEMINI/OPENAI key in this env); the internal code-reviewer ran as the documented fallback (no HIGH findings; M1/M2/M4 fixed, M3 documented trade-off).

Full monorepo per-plugin suites delegated to CI ci.yml; locally ran the touched scopes green: shipwright-compliance 736, shared/tests 3580 (+12 skip), shared/scripts/tools/tests 61, shared/scripts/tests 196, integration-tests 169.

arch-impact meta-test (test_architecture_md_reflects_arch_impact) may false-fail locally on OTHER iterates' gitignored staged decision-drops resolved from the main root; this run's own drop (component) has its architecture.md entry. CI sees only committed drops (green).

Security dimension n/a (local securityreports stale/FP-laden; authoritative = CI gate via AR-10). Change-reconciliation dimension n/a until BP-2 persists per-FR impact. D4 detective left at its honest pre-existing fail (stale FR-01.01 snapshot; disabled in audit_config) — not masked.

behaviors.behavior: is_traced / is_satisfied_no_fr / is_behavior_affecting predicates (incl. behavior-affecting is never satisfied)
FR-gate blocks a behavior-affecting (spec_impact add/modify/remove) change with no FR, at CLI AND finalize, intent-independently
Gate still accepts FR-linked / satisfied-no-FR and rejects unclassified
count_traced credits FR-linked AND satisfied-no-FR (feeds events_fr_tagged)
Dashboard 'Recent changes traced to an FR' WARNs on a relative drop AND an absolute-zero freeze
D1 coverage is all-time (no spec-update watermark); never-covered FR still flagged
D5 no-FR exemption excludes behavior-affecting changes (write-gate parity)
behaviors.evidence: is_satisfied_no_fr unit test pins the carve-out; D5 delegates to it (live D5 pass)

behaviors.behavior: audit_config re-enables D1 (passes honestly) and keeps D4 disabled
